items.name_en: In stock 26C Mini Tote
items.name_cn:
In stock 26C Mini Tote
Mini size is more practical for daily use!!️ Calfskin is lightweight, soft, and delicate; the lazy and casual shape, with large quilted pattern and chain strap accents, looks great and holds a lot! Both elegant and relaxed 🤩 Perfect for casual outfits, a total fashion girl. Simply too easy to carry! size:30*18*6cm99539

items.name_en: In stock 26C Series Pearl Chain Clutch. Classic quilted, small lambskin. 🌟🌟🌟 Vintage metal chain with pearl accents, elegant and modern. Hobo shape, moderate capacity, fits phone 📱 and lipstick. Great for commuting or going out. Adjustable strap, switch between shoulder and crossbody. Pearl chain is very dynamic, adds a vibe. Black and gold colorway, understated luxury, practical and stylish. size:13-23.5-7.99537

items.name_en: 26C Series Blue Suede CF Bag, classic quilted pattern + light gold hardware, retro and premium! Suede is soft and delicate, perfect for autumn/winter vibes. Chain with leather wrap design, works for shoulder or crossbody. Perfect size, super practical for daily outings. The 26C series colors and materials have a strong vacation vibe, a must-have for fashionistas!
